developer_response.body: I am sorry that this game is not satisfactory for you, but it does offer lots of things to do!

reviews.review_title: If I could give 0 stars I 1000% would
reviews.review_description: I mean this in the most respectful way possible, this game sucks. The horror mode is terrible. The black robot just follows you! Even if your spawned in that robot is following you and not to mention it’s faster then ANYBODY in the game and the only way to survive it is by being above it! The image on front looks NOTHING like it does in the game and the cosmetics are mid teir! Honestly I don’t think I ever want to have a experience in this game again.

developer_response.body: We apologize for your negative experience with the game. We understand that it can be disappointing and frustrating when a game does not meet your expectations or needs. We value your feedback and will take it into consideration as we continue to improve the game. We strive to provide a positive and enjoyable experience for all players, and we regret that we fell short in your case. We would like to assure you that we are continuously working on improving the game, including the horror mode and cosmetics, to make it a better experience for everyone. We hope that you can give us another chance in the future and see the improvements we have made. Thank you for bringing your concerns to our attention.

reviews.review_title: This game is not what I excepted
reviews.review_description: Well in a bad way the trailer is completely different than the game and it just sucks the robots are actually robot kyle so they put no effort into making their own player model and the horror entity is to fast it is faster than everyone and the horror just sucks really badly so I would go insane in like 30 minutes when I am playing this game it is very limited the cosmetics suck and the only thing that there is, is very bad horror, cosmetics and a computer I would give it 0 out 5 stars and if you are looking for a bad gtag fangame here it is robot rushers
I cant change the version of the game.

developer_response.body: Please reconsider your rating, this is not Robot Runner, this is a different game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. While I appreciate your interest in my game, I would like to clarify that my game is a fan game of Gorilla Tag. Additionally, I would like to point out that my game does not have any old Christmas or Halloween updates that are similar to Gorilla Tag, as this is a completely separate game with its own unique features and updates. I have put a lot of effort into developing my game to offer a unique gaming experience that sets it apart from other games, including Gorilla Tag. Thank you for your understanding and I hope you enjoy my game.
